title: quercus lanuginosa var. parviglandis
intro: Quercus lanuginosa var. parviglandis, also known as the small-leaved or dwarf oak, is a variety of Quercus lanuginosa, a deciduous tree native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Quercus lanuginosa var. parviglandis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Quercus lanuginosa var. parviglandis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make traditional Chinese medicines and supplements.
